name: Citrus Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp hot chili pepper sauce or red-pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the orange, grapefruit, lime, and lemon.
2. Cut each fruit into segments over a large stainless steel bowl to catch excess juices.
3. Carefully dice the segments without crushing them.
4. Add oil, vinegar, soy sauce, and chili sauce to the fruit juices in the bowl; whisk until blended.
5. Stir in the peppercorns, ginger, cilantro, diced fruit, and salt (if using) to combine.
6. Makes about 1 1/4 cups.
